headline: Paccar: Big Earnings Beat Likely Coming, Stock Could Re-Rate
summary: PACCAR is poised for an earnings beat, with margin improvement and positive Q2 outlook expected despite weak heavy truck markets. Read why PCAR stock is a buy.
